chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Rev. A. No.S- 97 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections For hearing of main case. 12.02.2021. Mr. Shahzad Ahmed Narejo, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Riaz Hussain Solangi, advocate for the respondents No.3 to6. Mr. Shewak Rathore, Addl.P.G for State. ==== At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant will not press the disposal of instant Criminal Revision Application on merit, if he is permitted either to lodge a Direct Complaint of the incident in terms of impugned order or to make statement before the police in connection with investigation of FIR already recorded, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
